'''damusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphocentronid|xiphocentronid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphocentronid|xiphocentronid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| damusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmisith|dæmisith]] || [[word:dæmisij|dæmisij]] || [[word:dæmisish|dæmisish]] || [[word:dæmisi|dæmisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damumusuth|damumusuth]] || [[word:damumusuj|damumusuj]] || [[word:damumusush|damumusush]] || [[word:damumusu|damumusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damusuth|damusuth]] || [[word:damusuj|damusuj]] || [[word:damusush|damusush]] || [[word:damusu|damusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damufsuth|damufsuth]] || [[word:damufsuj|damufsuj]] || [[word:damufsush|damufsush]] || [[word:damufsuf|damufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damusuthu|damusuthu]] || [[word:damusuju|damusuju]] || [[word:damusushu|damusushu]] || [[word:damusuku|damusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damusuth|damusuth]] || [[word:damusuj|damusuj]] || [[word:damusush|damusush]] || [[word:damusu|damusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damusuthul|damusuthul]] || [[word:damusujul|damusujul]] || [[word:damusushul|damusushul]] || [[word:damusukul|damusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damusuthuthu|damusuthuthu]] || [[word:damusujuju|damusujuju]] || [[word:damusushushu|damusushushu]] || [[word:damusuku|damusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damusuthun|damusuthun]] || [[word:damusujun|damusujun]] || [[word:damusushun|damusushun]] || [[word:damusukun|damusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damusuthuoro|damusuthuoro]] || [[word:damusujuoro|damusujuoro]] || [[word:damusushuoro|damusushuoro]] || [[word:damusukuoro|damusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
